As a account manager
I want to include or exclude notes in an export
So that shared reports contain only relevant meeting history

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] ExportPanel lists notes for the selected account.
- [ ] Users can toggle individual notes.
- [ ] Generated output includes only selected notes.
- [ ] No-note selections still allow exporting other sections.
